description: Evaluate the impact of a 'Città 30' (30 km/h) speed limit policy on the Pasubio neighborhood in Bologna using SUMO. Using the scenario in '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/', generate baseline simulation results (trip info and edge-based noise data) using 'pasubio_buslanes.net.xml'. Create a modified network file named 'pasubio_city30.net.xml' where all lanes with speed limits exceeding 8.33 m/s are capped at exactly 8.33 m/s, then perform a second simulation to capture the corresponding trip info and noise data. Save the baseline trip info to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_tripinfo.xml', baseline noise to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_noise.xml', the modified network to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_city30.net.xml', the policy trip info to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/city30_tripinfo.xml', and the policy noise to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/city30_noise.xml'.
